name: ZIP DAESUNG
overview: A web variety show that will be aired every Friday at 6 PM starting April 5, 2024. It contains the ambiguous meaning of the word "house" and "daesung", which means "to gather various things together and complete them into one system."

trailers.title: [EN/JP] YG에서 너 다시 부르려고 했어ㅣ빅뱅 연습생 시절 썰  | 집대성 ep.01
